records.ety: [L. generalitas: cf. F. gnralit. Cf. Generalty.]

defs: The state of being general; the quality of including species or particulars.
That which is general; that which lacks specificalness, practicalness, or application; a general or vague statement or phrase.
quotes: Let us descend from generalities to particulars.
The glittering and sounding generalities of natural right which make up the Declaration of Independence.

defs: The main body; the bulk; the greatest part; as, the generality of a nation, or of mankind.
